distinguishes.reason: This crosses the observed VIP tier with the observed 4500-cent amount while holding DAMAGED condition, SKU, and inventory constant. A tier-driven explanation and an amount-driven explanation therefore imply different rule selection, without introducing an unobserved amount value.

expectedInformationGain: Maximum among single crossed inputs: it directly separates tier-driven from amount-driven explanations by combining VIP with the exact amount previously observed only for STANDARD. It also minimizes redundancy and avoids confounding from condition or inventory changes.
